textByHash.6556f017dd5456ca732689b73d0ddd8d0a582d39: You're going to need a bronze pickaxe to get through there!
textByHash.2c394e2438332d952d1032b7ca81e7a08bcbf568: Well, I don't claim to have a lot of knowledge about the ways of magic, but there's a strange protection spell on there.
textByHash.126e2ea09db9a9b43a09d94217b9842f07ca2dd9: Yes. Apparently the makers of this tunnel protected it against all forms of pickaxes except bronze.
textByHash.c859ec13036086c5d8a1695547a7a7cf9fc899af: I don't think they thought anyone would actually try and use a bronze pickaxe as it's such a poor instrument!
textByHash.98edf447f235d600bee11b449f1ab45383c4ed2b: Ah. You must be , right? I have a bronze pickaxe here for you!
textByHash.04ee812e08e2920d8cfc372c483eaa7aafc93505: My employer, Surok Magis, sent word to me that you may come to use the tunnel. You will need something to help you get in there. The pickaxe I've given to you should help.
textByHash.d31fb531e3c720632a72e5c7f2f9bb88c291aad3: Oh. Alright then! My employer, Surok Magis, sent word to me that you may come to use the tunnel. You'll need your bronze pickaxe to get in there.
textByHash.8a19655d6e2e986368023c728fb81e614743d259: Why, the Chaos Tunnel of course! I imagine Surok will have told you of it.
textByHash.ba60c08f8b35a7c6c7fd943608e4711f81e12b1a: Well, story and rumour has it that the Dagon'hai built a tunnel here under the statue of Saradomin that would allow them to visit the Chaos Altar without having to go through the Wilderness.
textByHash.a1232acff1978e3a73251a5dcdcdcbe17a0367a9: Yes, it is. Or, at least, it would be. Unfortunately, I haven't been able to get in there so far.
textByHash.25a41e636f3f43bbd45568e98d154ef8e8a1eade: The tunnel entrance needs to be cleared before anyone can get in there. However, my Mining skill isn't high enough at all to do it myself. Perhaps you could have a go?
textByHash.5331b49e3e1ffa3d2acaf39ed21997e819f6f8f3: My name is Louisiana Jones, although most people call me Anna. I'm an archaeologist.
textByHash.17d4c02006f1519e940dbf4daf106a136826c01d: That, my dear, is the statue of the great god Saradomin himself. Stand and admire in awe for you are in the presence of greatness!
textByHash.e21bc85393d970c28ee8e7563b43ef8064e47f35: Well story and rumour has it that the Dagon'hai built a tunnel under this statue of Saradomin that would allow them to visit the Chaos Altar without having to go through the Wilderness.
textByHash.0cd6125ec1e4841f8e506a4071b734a84eb09383: Yes, it is. Or, at least, it would be. I came to excavate the tunnel but, unfortunately, there so far.
textByHash.544a7d49c5599d590fee1bdb1e322a0687d52a6f: The tunnel entrance needs to be cleared before anyone can get in there. However, my Mining skill just isn't what it used to be. Perhaps you could have a go?
textByHash.365a62207d26dd891c0c05c888410f4c377fd3e6: Be careful! You're going to bring the statue down on both of our heads if you go swinging wildly away like that.
textByHash.8d15b4f87c5ddb52458f0f0f74fd95a8268e3889: I would suggest you improve your Mining skills a bit before you attempt this.
textByHash.1e7ad3f44b4f6bed490e90bace6d762cb99417d6: You did it! Oh, well done! How exciting!
textByHash.6382bc1b6ff04655b5890bfcc81b4b987de2c19e: You opened the tunnel; well done!
textByHash.5d5880e069f2b357c032102b33915961e6777a21: I'd better not. My orders were to open up the entrance and wait for Surok to arrive. When he gets here, we'll go in together. He promised me a lot of gold for this job!
textByHash.8bfe2c2a8eb3149fa06ce209e01f226ce324f7d5: Well, now. Do you always go around asking about people like that? It's very rude, you know.
textByHash.d60f837aff2e39cb8747ab0888924546e376e260: That's alright. My name is Louisiana Jones, although most people call me Anna. I'm an archaeologist.
textByHash.46a9bfe7c1acbcb589399becbfb5018115535f1d: Hah! No. I used to, but now I prefer to work freelance for independent employers.
textByHash.bca170ff9ebe89d8fda93d67b0fcab32dbbdc551: I'm afraid I can't say that either.
textByHash.79be243a7e330488df7952b99d76e19f47500e7b: I can say that I can't say anything about what you want me to say!
textByHash.0c1997300a8277cb8d6b246c0ae28f6f83492500: That, my dear, is the statue of the great god Saradomin himself. Stand and admire in awe, for you are in the presence of greatness!
textByHash.13e4e219572d02fa16c68ec8f0689af667ee44d1: I see. I'm afraid I haven't seen it.
textByHash.70a20316aee73622e19e392857637917f7ddc366: Excuse me. I am working on that statue at the moment. Please don't touch it.
textByHash.55df16f05f0905a5a593b57812f7b93fcd0a2237: When I decide to start work again. Right now, I'm enjoying sitting on this bench.
textByHash.0db11fb8cd0c83d1c26629379f88804c866a445b: Yes, it is. Or, at least, it would be. I came to excavate the tunnel but, unfortunately, I haven't been able to get in there so far.
